configurations.name: dev-server
runtimeArgs: const http=require('http'),fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'),url=require('url');const dir='/Users/jaydenkang/Desktop/New Projects/20260303_클로드 설명';const mime={'.html':'text/html','.css':'text/css','.js':'application/javascript','.json':'application/json','.png':'image/png','.jpg':'image/jpeg','.svg':'image/svg+xml','.ttf':'font/ttf','.xlsx':'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet'};http.createServer((req,res)=>{let p=decodeURIComponent(url.parse(req.url).pathname);if(p==='/') p='/index.html';const fp=path.join(dir,p);fs.readFile(fp,(err,data)=>{if(err){res.writeHead(404);res.end('Not found');return;}const ext=path.extname(fp).toLowerCase();res.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':mime[ext]||'application/octet-stream'});res.end(data);});}).listen(8080,()=>console.log('Server on 8080'));
